Configure update intervals and polling b: Configure update intervals and polling behavior for OpenF1 API.
Automatically switch between fast and sl: Automatically switch between fast and slow polling based on race schedule
Update interval in seconds when no race: Update interval in seconds when no race session is active (default: 1 hour = 3600s)
Update interval in seconds during active: Update interval in seconds during active race sessions (default: 10s). OpenF1 rate limit: 3 req/s, 30 req/min - 10s is safe!
